title: campanula cenisia
intro: Campanula cenisia, also known as the Cenis Alpenbellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the European Alps. Campanula cenisia has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. This plant has been valued for its health benefits, including its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Campanula cenisia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
